820000.name: Lust Shatter
descriptionLines: A shotgun used em mercenaries who guarded the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Slug Shot^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Slug Shot^000000 em additional 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 em 10%.
Diminui ^009900Slug Shot^000000 skill cooldown em 2 segundos.
Diminui ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Slug Shot^000000 em additional 25%.
When ^009900Slug Shot^000000 has been used, Aumenta o dano de ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 em additional 25% for 10 segundos.

820001.name: Patent Demon Slayer Shot
descriptionLines: A shotgun with the power of the soul used by those who have reached the Level of Gunmaster, which can handle all firearms skillfully.
He regained the glory of the past and began to show his abilities.
It seems to resonate with the Great Hero's Boots.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 3%.
Aumenta physical o dano against ^0033CCBoss^000000 class, ^FF0000Demônio^000000 and ^FF0000Morto-vivo^000000 raças de monstros by 15%.
Aumenta ATQ by 50 and ranged physical o dano by 10% for 90 segundos.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Banishing Buster^000000 and ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 by 35%.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 5%.

820002.name: Adulter Fides Shotgun
descriptionLines: A shotgun filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 skill cooldown by 1 second.
Increases o dano of ^009900Shattering Storm^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.
